title: <div>  •  Day Thread Prompt: How does modern journalism shape our perception of
content:
• Day Thread Prompt: How does modern journalism shape our perception of reality?
• Night Thread Prompt: Write a stream-of-consciousness reflection about what it means to “see truth.”

✅ Why This Works:
• Keeps the personal engagement structured but creative.
• Blends academic rigor with introspective exploration.

✍ 6. Weekly Creative & Extra Credit Assignments

🚀 Every week includes two optional extra credit opportunities:
1. 📚 Recommendation Thread – Students suggest alternative readings, movies, or games tied to course themes.
2. 🎭 Creative Extra Credit – A writing or artistic task thematically tied to the week’s lessons.

Example:
📖 Week 7 – Postmodernism & The Collapse of Grand Narratives
• 📚 Recommendation: Suggest a modern TV show or meme culture reference that reflects postmodern ideas.
• 🎭 Creative Task: Write a self-referential story where the narrator is aware of the audience.

✅ Why This Works:
• Encourages broader engagement beyond the syllabus.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 16 (chunk 16/555)
